{{Quote|It's good to see you, Four-Two.|RC-1138, to Delta 42|<ref name="Star Wars: Republic Commando">''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]''</ref>}}
'''Delta 42''' was [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta Squad's]] [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/Legends|LAAT]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who gave them various air support and extractions. He helped Delta Squad out of an exploding [[Core ship/Legends|Core ship]] on [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]].

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Four-Two's dead? That's...a shame. He served the Republic well|01/425 to Boss, from a scene cut from the game|<ref name="Star Wars: Republic Commando" />}}
This clone pilot was originally going to have a relatively larger role in the game, namely, he would be Delta Squad's pilot during a ship crash on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] that was cut from the game. His corpse could be found in the game files.

During regular gameplay, a line from [[Scorch/Legends|Scorch]] during Kashyyyk campaign while fighting [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshans]], is " That's for Delta 32! Or was it 42?" He is mentioning that this is revenge for 42's death after the cut ship crash, and may have accidentally been left in the game.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]'' {{1st}}
